sourceNotes: User provided the full Gang Manager SaaS redesign brief in Thai.
Local PROJECTX reference docs confirmed the IA split, billing separation, finance separation, and page rework goals.
Preview uses compact sample values only and is not connected to provider data.
transformations: Converted the brief into a modern-minimal live HTML artifact.
Normalized the navigation into six groups: Command, People, Attendance, Finance, Billing, Setup.
Specified primary actions, page layout, mobile behavior, component system, and state coverage.
